title: Bible Principles​—Why Are They Important?
theme: “Present your bodies as . . . a sacred service with your power of reason.”​—ROM. 12:1.
focus: To explain what principles are and how we can identify them when we read the Bible.
subheadings: HOW CAN WE IDENTIFY BIBLE PRINCIPLES?
BE DETERMINED TO LIVE BY BIBLE PRINCIPLES
review_questions: What is a Bible principle? Your answer
How do principles differ from laws? Your answer
What are some of the principles that Jesus taught in the Sermon on the Mount? Your answer
